nasb.text: Now when they had traveled through Amphipolis and Apollonia, they came to Thessalonica, where there was a synagogue of the Jews.

esv.text: Now when they had passed through Amphipolis and Apollonia, they came to Thessalonica, where there was a synagogue of the Jews.

cnv.text: 保羅和西拉經過暗非波里、亞波羅尼亞，來到帖撒羅尼迦，在那裡有猶太人的會堂。

ccb.text: 保罗和西拉经过暗非坡里和亚波罗尼亚，到了帖撒罗尼迦。那里有犹太人的会堂。

csbs.text: 保罗和赛拉斯经过安菲波利斯和阿波罗尼亚，来到帖撒罗尼迦。那里有一个犹太人的会堂。
